name: Namibia Critical Metals Inc.
description: Namibia Critical Metals Inc. is a Canadian-based mining company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of a diversified portfolio of critical metals properties in Namibia. The company is primarily developing the Lofdal heavy rare earth project, which is a globally significant source of dysprosium and terbium. These critical metals are essential for the production of permanent magnets used in electric vehicles and other high-tech applications. With a strong operational presence in Namibia, the company leverages local expertise to advance its projects within a stable mining jurisdiction, aiming to meet the growing global demand for sustainable energy materials.
